      fun x => p x ∨ q x) ≤
    bliminf u
        { sets := sets✝, univ_sets := univ_sets✝, sets_of_superset := sets_of_superset✝, inter_sets := inter_sets✝ } p ⊓
      bliminf u
        { sets := sets✝, univ_sets := univ_sets✝, sets_of_superset := sets_of_superset✝, inter_sets := inter_sets✝ } q
